player_notes.lamelo ball: Ball avoided suspension after the Bam Adebayo tripping incident (only fined); no availability concerns heading into the Hornets' play-in game vs. Orlando.
player_notes.stephen curry: Curry scored 35 pts with 7 three-pointers in the play-in win over the Clippers; carrying heavy offensive load and in strong form heading into the Suns series.
player_notes.desmond bane: Bane is now with Orlando after the trade; monitor his role/minutes integration with the Magic in the play-in game vs. Charlotte.

game_notes.CHA vs ORL: LaMelo Ball (no suspension, fully available) leads Charlotte; Desmond Bane's role and minutes with Orlando may still be settling — watch for lineup/usage clarity closer to tip.
game_notes.GSW vs PHX: Curry enters off a 35-point, 7-three performance; Draymond Green also noted as a key defensive factor. Warriors advancing to face Suns.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Stephen Curry (GSW) — Right knee ('runner's knee'). Missed 27 games. Returned Apr 7 on ~25 min restriction. Only 3 games since return. Still ramping for play-in. Per-minute production solid but conditioning uncertain.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Multiple news items from Apr 16 confirm Curry scored 35 points (27 in the second half) with 7 three-pointers, leading the Warriors past the Clippers 126-121 in the play-in game. This is a major performance update — he has now played at least 4 games since his return, and his conditioning/output was elite, not uncertain.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update Curry's status: he has now completed the play-in game with a 35-point, 7-3PM performance. Remove 'conditioning uncertain' caveat and update games-since-return to at least 4. Note that his minutes restriction may have been lifted or significantly relaxed given the workload in this game. GSW advances to face the PHX/GSW play-in final on Apr 17.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Apr 15: GSW (10) def. LAC (9) West — LAC eliminated. Apr 17: PHX vs GSW (West 8-seed final)
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News confirms the Warriors defeated the Clippers on Apr 15 (published Apr 16), consistent with context. However, the 'Stephen A.: Porzingis will be the key for the Warriors' headline references 'Warriors' matchup against the Suns,' confirming the PHX vs GSW play-in final is indeed scheduled for Apr 17. No direct conflict, but the Porzingis framing is notable — context doc does not list Porzingis as a GSW player of note for the play-in game, though it does record him as traded to GSW. This is consistent with context.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: No change needed to bracket structure — context is accurate. Optionally flag Kristaps Porzingis (GSW) as an active contributor being discussed as a key player for the Warriors' play-in vs PHX, in case prop picks are generated for that game.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Apr 14: CHA (9) def. MIA (10) East — MIA eliminated
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News items from Apr 16-17 reference LaMelo Ball being fined (not suspended) for tripping Bam Adebayo, with Spoelstra saying no further penalty is needed and LaMelo saying 'no rift with Bam.' This incident occurred during the CHA vs MIA play-in game, consistent with CHA defeating MIA. No factual conflict with the outcome, but confirms LaMelo was involved in a notable incident during that game that the context doc does not mention.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Add a note that LaMelo Ball received a fine (not suspension) for tripping Bam Adebayo during the Apr 14 play-in game. He is available for CHA's Apr 17 play-in final vs ORL with no suspension risk.

suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Add Jock Landale (ATL) to the playoff injury landscape under 'Active with Documented Concerns' or 'Confirmed Out for R1 start': out at least first two weeks of playoffs (sprained right ankle). This is consistent with context doc facts (Trae Young traded to WAS, Anthony Davis traded to WAS, Brian Keefe as coach). No factual conflict.
